footer.tagline: Designed for the elite builder community.
footer.creator: Creator

landing.empty_username_warning: Please enter a GitHub username to copy your badge link.
landing.max_length_warning: GitHub username limit reached (39 characters maximum)
landing.title:
Elevate Your
Contribution Story.
landing.subtitle: Stop settling for flat grids. Generate high-fidelity, 3D isometric monoliths that visualize your coding rhythm with professional precision.
landing.preview_placeholder_title: Enter a GitHub username to preview
landing.preview_placeholder_desc: Your 3D contribution monolith will appear here as soon as you add a username.
landing.preview_auto_theme: Random theme changes on every page load and disables caching
landing.preview_caching_tip: Preview updates on every change. Hosted badge is cached at UTC midnight
landing.preview_empty_tip: Add a username to enable live preview and export snippets

features.sync_desc: Pulled directly from GitHub GraphQL API. Your streak updates as fast as your code pushes.
features.theme_desc: Switch between Neon, Dracula, or custom HEX modes via simple URL management.
features.isometric_desc: Sophisticated 3D projection formulas turn 2D data into digital architecture.

success_guide.title: Your Monolith is Ready - Deploy It in 4 Steps
success_guide.step_1_body: Navigate to github.com/YOUR_USERNAME/YOUR_USERNAME - your special profile repository.
success_guide.step_2_body: Click the pencil icon to open the file in GitHub's built-in editor.
success_guide.step_3_body: Place your cursor wherever you want the monolith to appear, then paste (Ctrl+V / Cmd+V).
success_guide.step_4_body: Click "Commit changes" and visit your profile. Your 3D streak is now live.
success_guide.color_tip: Tip: Add ?accent=808080 to the URL to change your monolith's colour palette.

customize_cta.title: Want to fine-tune your monolith?
customize_cta.desc: Dial in every pixel — swap accent colors, try a dark or neon theme, toggle logarithmic height scaling, and preview changes live before you paste a single line.

customize.title: Fine-tune your monolith.
customize.desc: Every change below updates the preview in real-time. Copy the export snippet when you're done. No extra steps required.
customize.empty_preview_desc: The live badge preview will appear here once a username is added.

export.snippet_desc: Switch formats without changing the live badge configuration.
export.copy_aria_disabled: Add a GitHub username to enable copying the {{format}} export snippet
export.footer_tip: Paste this into your GitHub profile's README.md. The badge renders server-side, no script required.

share.title: Share Pulse
share.copy_link_desc: Copy your profile URL to clipboard
share.share_x_desc: Tweet your pulse to the world
share.share_linkedin_desc: Post your dev activity to your network
share.copy_markdown_desc: Copy markdown snippet for your README
share.download_png_desc: Save a snapshot of your dashboard
share.download_json_desc: Export raw streak and language data
